What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and patterned tie stands behind a black table covered with emergency supplies. A black backpack with a white logo sits on the left side of the table next to two orange collapsible bowls. The man gestures with his hands and holds a green safety lightstick. Vertical screens in the background display a satellite image of a hurricane and the text JD's Hurricane Gear Test.

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the presenter regarding the hurricane gear on the table, specifically noting when the backpack is highlighted and when the lightstick is handled.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a man stands behind a table displaying hurricane gear; at 8s, the view focuses on a black backpack with a white logo; at 14s, a hand reaches for green packaged lightsticks on the table; at 16s, the man holds up a green glow stick in front of his chest.
